title: Analyst/Senior Analyst, Pricing Marketing (Marketing Analytics, Bangkok Based, Relocation provided)
required_skills: Bachelor's degree or higher in quantitative subject (CS, mathematics, engineering, science)
2+ years in management consulting / investment banking / PE / strategy or business operations at fast-growing tech company
Data analysis tools: SAS, R, SPSS, Python, VBA, SQL
matched_skills: Strategy/business operations experience (HSBC Strategy PMO, GRG Product Marketing Manager, IPC Marketing Manager)
Numerical reasoning (financial analytics, KPI frameworks, ROI measurement)
Excel proficiency (MS Excel listed in tools)
Digital marketing experience (campaign analytics, B2B product launches, channel strategy, conversion tracking)
missing_skills: Explicit quantitative degree (CS/math/engineering/science) — not stated in CV
SAS, R, SPSS, Python, or SQL — none listed in CV tools
core_responsibilities: Experiment with text ads, bidding strategies, and campaign structures across search engines (Google, Bing, Baidu, Naver)
Test, analyze, and optimize display campaigns on social platforms (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram)
Analyze large volumes of experimental data and develop optimization models
Roll out changes from successful A/B tests across marketing programs
recommended_emphasis: Highlight A/B testing and experiment design experience prominently — directly aligns with Agoda's test-and-learn culture
Emphasize any exposure to SQL or Python even if basic — or note willingness/ability to learn quickly given quantitative background
Showcase dashboard-building experience (Power BI PL-300 certification, Looker Studio) for the modeling/dashboard responsibility
Frame HSBC Strategy PMO and GRG roles as strategy/business operations at scale to meet the 2+ years consulting/IB/strategy requirement
Stress multi-market experience (EMEA, APAC) and campaign performance analytics to reinforce digital marketing bonus skill
Lead with data-driven identity and numerical reasoning given Agoda's strong quantitative culture
